description_long: This humanoid robot features a robust, metallic body with a rounded torso and a prominent green circular element at the center of its chest, possibly functioning as a sensor or power core. Its head is small and dome-shaped, with what appears to be a red sensor or camera on top. The robot's arms are long and cylindrical, with black segmented sections suggesting articulation, and end in three-pronged claw-like hands. The legs are thick and mechanical, with red accents and jointed knees, terminating in wide, tripod-like feet for stability. Decorative decals and markings are visible on the chest and shoulders, adding a touch of character to its otherwise industrial design. The overall appearance is sleek yet utilitarian, suitable for urban environments where durability and functionality are essential.
description: A metallic humanoid robot with a rounded torso, long articulated arms, tripod feet, and a central green chest element, adorned with decals and red accents.
description_view_0: Front view shows the robot's green chest element, symmetrical arms, tripod feet, and visible chest decals.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the robot's rounded torso, the depth of its limbs, and the dome-shaped head with a top sensor.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the back of the torso, additional decals, and the structure of the legs and feet.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displays the profile of the arms, legs, and the curvature of the torso.
attribute_pose: The robot is standing upright with both arms extended downward and slightly outward, legs straight and feet planted firmly on the ground, head facing forward.
attribute_clothing_style: The robot is unclothed, featuring only integrated metallic panels and decorative decals on its chest and shoulders.
attribute_facial_features: The robot has a small, dome-shaped head with a red sensor or camera on top and no visible eyes, mouth, or expressive facial features.
attribute_limb_articulation: Arms and legs have visible hinge and rotary joints at the shoulders, elbows, hips, and knees, with articulated three-pronged hands and tripod feet; limbs appear rigid but jointed for movement.
attribute_presence_of_sensors: Visible sensors include a green circular element on the chest and a red sensor or camera on top of the head.
